title: Station 1 – Ex 7: Are you allowed to use...? (Medienerlaubnis)
description: Darf man...? Fragen und Antworten mit 'be allowed to'. Mehrere Formate werden akzeptiert – trenne Varianten mit Komma.

items.question: ___ you allowed to use the TV? (Frage)
Yes, I ___ allowed to use the TV. (positiv)
No, I ___ allowed to use the TV. (negativ)
Sometimes I ___ allowed to use it. (manchmal)
How long ___ you allowed to use the internet? (Frage)
I'm allowed to use it ___ one hour a day. (für)
___ I allowed to use a smartphone? (Frage 1. Person)
He ___ allowed to use social networks. (darf nicht)
We ___ allowed to play video games after 9pm. (dürfen nicht)
Anna ___ allowed to use the TV. (darf)
Are you allowed to use a mobile phone ___ school? (in der Schule)
